nodes.name: fallenUlt
nodes.description:
Click Combo: F

Summons 6 Corrupted Spikes that rise from
the earth around you, dealing damage.

Casting Main Attack or Uppercut on a spike
will detonate it, dealing damage and granting
10% Overhealth ❤ even while Corrupted.
Bonus health decays over 20s.

 Total Damage: 1500% (of your DPS, summon)
( Damage: 1000%)
( Earth: 500%)
 Area of Effect: 4 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Range: 5~8 Blocks

 Total Damage: 2000% (of your DPS, detonate)
( Damage: 1400%)
( Earth: 300%)
( Fire: 300%)
 Area of Effect: 10 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

Activate abilities or take damage to charge
your Ultimate Meter  to 100%
